falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 50 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price rises 15% above the current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A 15% upward move would invalidate the bottom_2024_aug pattern (which typically precedes a decline), proving the current HOLD/UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume drops below 50% of the 20-day average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volume would indicate lack of market participation, falsifying the assumption of an ongoing consolidation phase implied by the current HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
